## New Skin: `<name>`

Brief description of the theme and aesthetic.

## Checklist

- [ ] `skins/<name>.yaml` added with `name:` key matching filename
- [ ] Screenshot generated and committed to `screenshots/<name>.png`
- [ ] Entry added to the **Custom** section of `README.md`
- [ ] `python3 validate_skins.py` passes with no errors
- [ ] Tested locally with `/skin <name>` in Hermes
